form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 41-day let-up. Last start 2nd in a small field at Scottsville on March 1 over 1400m, long-neck behind I'm A Fireball with 60kg at $2.30. Before that favourite; won by a head at Kenilworth January 10 over 1400m defeating Powerandtheglory carrying 61.5kg at $7. Promising colt who drops in the weights for this. Big chance to score after a near miss last start.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 31 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 2 len at Scottsville March 11 over 1400m defeating Randolph Hearst with 61.5kg at $2. The race before that favourite; won by a neck at Scottsville February 15 over 1500m defeating Jp's Palace with 61kg at $6. In top form winning last two. Draws a nice alley and rates highly.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 9th of 14 at Kenilworth on January 31 over 1400m, 6 len behind Snow Pilot with 61.5kg at $6.50. Won previous preparation first up won by 0.5 len at Kenilworth November 22 over 1400m defeating Sail The Seas with 56kg at $4.50. Has a great record course and distance and best form is fresh. Bold performance expected.

form.formComment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Scottsville on March 11 over 1400m, 2 len behind Talk To The Master with 55.5kg at $2.10. The start before that 6th of 8 at Kenilworth in the G3 Politician Stakes on January 31 over 1800m, 8 len behind Star Major carrying 60kg at $5.50. Nice effort last time. Trip suits suits and will be winding up strongly.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 30-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.4 len at Turffontein Inside March 12 over 1450m on a rain affected track defeating Got The Feeling with 53kg at $1.50. Won last start and is well-placed again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months won by 1.0 len at this track G3 March 27 over 1400m defeating I'm A Fireball with 54kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 10th of 15 at Kenilworth in the G1 Cape Guineas on December 13 over 1600m, 7 len behind Jan Van Goyen carrying 60kg at $67. Strong winner fresh and fitter again. Very good record course and distance. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation 12th of 15 at Kenilworth in the G1 Cape Guineas December 13 over 1600m, 8 len behind Jan Van Goyen with 60kg at $26. Previously first up; seventh of 9 at Durbanville September 13 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Pinot Grigio with 55.5kg at $15. Among the better chances.
